name: Ozu
description: The main character's mischievous friend, tied to him by "the black thread of fate." Ozu also appears as a child in The Night is Short, Walk on Girl. His ghastly appearance is due to his refusal to eat vegetables or anything of that nature, rather, he subsists off of instant foods and ramen.

name: Reimi  Sugimoto
description: Reimi Sugimoto is Yoshikage Kira's first victim, and as a ghost, chose to stay on Earth in hope of finding someone to help her bring Kira to justice.

name: Natsumi
description: __Angel:__ Haniel __Height:__ 144 cm (normal), 170 cm (adult form) __Rank:__ B-Class spirit Natsumi is the seventh Spirit to appear in the series. She first appears as a slender woman whose age should be slightly past 20 years old. ~!However, it is later revealed that her true form is a little girl with the appearance of a child with unkempt hair and clothing.!~ (Source: Date A Live Wiki)

name: Sting Eucliffe
nativeName: スティング・ユークリフ
description: Sting is a White Dragon Slayer and a Mage of the currently strongest Guild in Fiore, the Sabertooth. He was raised by the Dragon Weisslogia, who taught him White Dragon Slayer Magic. He eventually used this Magic to kill Weisslogia, in order to become a "real" Dragon Slayer. At some point in his life, Sting also implanted Dragon Lacrima into his body, thereby making him a third-generation Dragon Slayer.
searchTerms: スティング・ユークリフ

description: __Height:__ 166cm (5'4") Medaka is an incredibly beautiful and talented first year student. She became Hakoniwa Academy's Student President as she managed to get 98% of the student body's support. One of her pledges during her campaign was to set up a suggestion box (which later became known as the Medaka Box), along with her childhood friend Zenkichi, goes out to solve any and all problems that comes through. name: Reita Toritsuka

name: Patricia Thompson
nativeName: パトリシア・トンプソン
description: A Demon Weapon and the younger sister of [Elizabeth Thompson](https://anilist.co/character/8445/Elizabeth-Thompson). Known as one of the "Demon Twin Guns", both her and her sister were known as the "Brooklyn Devils" and were petty thugs until being found by their current Meister, [Death the Kid](https://anilist.co/character/8455). Overtime, she reformed from her thieving and ruffian ways along with Liz and became Kid's weapon, later becoming DWMA students within the E.A.T Class.

description: __Race:__ Vampire __Height__: 158 cm (5'1) She is treated by people as a cursed race and hates humans. For a certain reason, she has a strong will to go to the moon and aims to become an astronaut.

name: Kuon
description: A traveler hailing from land faraway from Yamato. A herbalist by trade, she is the one who saved Haku from the gigantic monstrosity. She styled herself as "Haku's guardian", taking upon herself the responsibility of caring for Haku until she deems that he can stand on his own. She is shown to harbor a great interest in ancient ruins and has the nobility air around her as some would say. ~!She is the Princess of Tuskur. nativeName: セバスチャン・モラン
description: An ex-soldier in the army who was declared KIA (Killed In Action) during the war of Afghanistan but now works with the Moriarty brothers. He is a outstanding sniper who often acts on his own. Although on the outside he holds a cocky and charming exterior he secretly suffers from a lot of psychological trauma following his military service .

name: Shiemi Moriyama
description: __Height:__ 165 cm (5'4") Slightly allergic to pollen. Shiemi is Rin's classmate and friend. Before she met Rin, Shiemi tended her grandmother's garden while her mother ran an Exorcist only shop inside True Cross Academy. During her encounter with Rin and Yukio, they were able to discover that Shiemi was having her life force leached out by a Demon. name: Pino
description: An infected Companion AutoReiv with a bubbly personality, she was owned by Raul Creed and Samantha Ross, Pino served as a surrogate child to the couple (in fact, in episode 19, everyone in the smile land gets so shocked that she is able to smile so "naturally", which is reasonable since she is "infected" with a soul. With the humanity within her, she then proceeds, under the request of all the friends she made in Smile Land, to save Smile Land from impending destruction upon Vincent's arrival).

name: Esil Radiru
description: Esil Radiru, or Elisa Radiru, is a daughter of the Radiru chief and an Aristocratic Demon found at the S-Rank Demon's Castle Instant Dungeon.

name: Yue-Lung Lee
description: __Height__:172 cm He is one of the main antagonists of the series and the youngest son of the Lee family, the largest crime family in China. (Source: BANANA FISH Wiki)

name: Jusetsu Ryuu
description: Jusetsu Ryuu is the current Raven Consort, a special consort that does not perform nighttime duties, despite living in the inner palace. She lives in the Yamei Palace without anyone in her palace, except herself. She is mysterious and aloof, and she is able to use special magical techniques passed on to her as a Raven Consort.

name: Saya Endou
description: Kokonotsu's classmate who runs a nearby cafe. She has a crush on Kokonotsu. At first alarmed by Hotaru's presence, she quickly befriends her for their goals are aligned: Hotaru wishes Kokonotsu to run the store while she wants him to keep staying in town. Saya has a hidden talent of toy mastery. At one point she defeats well prepared Hotaru at a Menko game, an event that leads Hotaru to start addressing her with suffix shi, an antiquated designation used by disciples to their masters. description: He is a twenty-something man with nothing much left and he can barely pay for his rent or food.
